exportResultData(Http.Request, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Method in class controllers.gui.Api
Returns result data only (not the result files, not the metadata).
exportResultFiles(Http.Request) - Method in class controllers.gui.Api
Returns all result files (not result data and not metadata) belonging to results in a zip.
exportResultMetadata(Http.Request, boolean, Boolean) - Method in class controllers.gui.Api
Returns all result's metadata (but not result files and not metadata) in a zip file.
exportResults(Http.Request, Boolean) - Method in class controllers.gui.Api
Returns results (including metadata, data, and files) in a zip file.
